title: 'Hearts' Shankland agrees free transfer to Rangers' - gossip
summary: Lawrence Shankland is set to join Rangers on a free transfer from Heart of Midlothian, while Celtic's pursuit of Marcelo Saracchi from Boca Juniors has stalled. The moves highlight significant activity in Scottish football's transfer market.
content: Rangers reportedly can sign Lawrence Shankland for free from Heart of Midlothian, but Celtic's talks about a permanent move for Marcelo Saracchi from Boca Juniors are said to have stalled.

zh.title: 心脏队沙克兰同意自由转会至流浪者队 - 传言
zh.summary: 劳伦斯·沙克兰将自由转会加入流浪者队，离开米德洛锡安心脏队，而凯尔特人队对博卡青年的马塞洛·萨拉奇的追求已经停滞。这些转会突显了苏格兰足球转会市场的重大活动。

title: Listen: Shankland's Rangers transfer and Celtic's double analysed
summary: BBC analysts examine Lawrence Shankland's impending move to Rangers and Celtic's domestic double-winning season. The discussion covers key Scottish football developments at season's end.
content: Hearts captain Lawrence Shankland seems on his way to Rangers while Celtic do the double.

zh.title: 听：沙克兰转会流浪者队和凯尔特人队双冠分析
zh.summary: 英国广播公司分析师讨论了劳伦斯·沙克兰即将转会流浪者队和凯尔特人队的国内双冠赛季。讨论涵盖了赛季末苏格兰足球的关键发展。

title: Messi suffers injury scare before World Cup
summary: Lionel Messi was substituted due to an apparent thigh injury ahead of next month's World Cup, raising fitness concerns for Argentina's star player. The injury comes at a critical time before the tournament.
content: Argentina star Lionel Messi is substituted with an apparent thigh problem before next month's World Cup.

zh.title: 梅西在世界杯前遭遇伤病警报
zh.summary: 利昂内尔·梅西因明显的大腿伤病在世界杯前一个月被替换下场，这引发了人们对阿根廷明星球员体能状况的担忧。伤病在赛前的关键时刻发生。

title: European absence can make Chelsea a threat - Rooney
summary: Wayne Rooney argues Chelsea will be stronger in the Premier League next season after failing to qualify for European competition, allowing the club to focus entirely on domestic priorities.
content: Chelsea will be "a real threat" in the Premier League next season after failing to qualify for Europe, says former Manchester United striker Wayne Rooney.

zh.title: 欧洲赛事缺席能让切尔西成为威胁 - 鲁尼
zh.summary: 韦恩·鲁尼辩称，切尔西在未能获得欧洲赛事资格后，下赛季在英超中将更强大，这将使俱乐部能够完全专注于国内优先事项。

title: Spurs survive, West Ham down - Wayne Rooney’s brutal final day verdict
summary: Tottenham secured Premier League safety while West Ham were relegated on the final day of the season. Wayne Rooney delivers his verdict on the dramatic conclusions and awards for the campaign.
content: Wayne reacts to West Ham’s relegation and gives out his end of season awards

zh.title: 热刺保级，西汉姆降级 - 鲁尼的残酷赛季末评价
zh.summary: 在赛季最后一天，托特纳姆热刺确保英超保级，而西汉姆联队被降级。韦恩·鲁尼对本赛季的戏剧性结果和奖项给出了他的评价。

title: Fabregas guides Como to UCL; Milan, Pulisic out
summary: Cesc Fabregas led Como to a historic Champions League qualification on the final day of Serie A with a dramatic 4-1 victory, while AC Milan were eliminated from the top four. The result marks an improbable rise for Como and a shocking conclusion to the season.
content: An improbable end to the Serie A season unfolded on Sunday as Cesc Fabregas and Como won to book a spot in the Champions League next season, while AC Milan were beaten at home to fall out of the top four.

zh.title: 法布雷加斯率科莫晋级欧冠；米兰、普利西奇出局
zh.summary: 塞克·法布雷加斯率领科莫在意甲最后一天以戏剧性的4:1胜利实现历史性欧冠出线，AC米兰则被淘汰出前四。这一结果标志着科莫的不可思议崛起和赛季的惊人收场。

title: Salah: 'Cried more than in whole life' in last gam...
summary: Mohamed Salah expressed profound emotion about his final Liverpool appearance, stating he cried more than at any other time in his life and reflected on his pride in winning major trophies at Anfield. His departure marks the end of a significant era for the club.
content: Mohamed Salah said that he "cried more than in [his] whole life" during his final Liverpool appearance and expressed his pride at "winning it all" at Anfield.

zh.title: 萨拉赫："在最后比赛中哭得比整个人生都多"
zh.summary: 穆罕默德·萨拉赫对其在利物浦的最后一次出场表达了深刻情感，称他哭得比人生任何时刻都多，并回顾了在安菲尔德赢得主要奖杯的骄傲。他的离开标志着该俱乐部一个重要时代的终结。

title: Conte out at Napoli, plays down links to Italy job...
summary: Antonio Conte announced his departure from Napoli after two years in charge, during which he restored the club to Serie A champions. He downplayed speculation about becoming Italy's national team manager.
content: Antonio Conte confirmed Sunday that he is leaving Napoli after two years in charge, during which he led the team back to the Serie A title.

zh.title: 孔蒂离开那不勒斯，淡化意大利国家队工作传闻
zh.summary: 安东尼奥·孔蒂宣布离开那不勒斯，在两年任期内他将该俱乐部恢复为意甲冠军。他对成为意大利国家队主教练的猜测不以为然。

title: Swanson scores first goal since '24 in Chicago win...
summary: Mallory Swanson returned to scoring for Chicago Stars FC after an 18-month absence due to maternity leave. Her goal marked a significant moment in her comeback to professional soccer.
content: Mallory Swanson didn't take long to get back on the scoresheet for Chicago Stars FC following her 18-month absence from the team for maternity leave.

zh.title: 斯旺森在芝加哥胜利中打入18个月来首球
zh.summary: 玛洛里·斯旺森在因生育假缺席18个月后，为芝加哥星队重新开始进球。她的进球标志着她职业足球生涯复出中的重要时刻。

title: Spurs stay up as West Ham relegated from EPL
summary: Tottenham avoided relegation from the Premier League on the final day of the 2025-26 season, while West Ham were relegated. The dramatic conclusion saw Spurs secure their top-flight status after a tense campaign.
content: Tottenham have avoided relegation from the Premier League on the final day of the 2025-26 season.

zh.title: 热刺保级，西汉姆联被英超降级
zh.summary: 托特纳姆在2025-26赛季最后一天避免了英超降级，而西汉姆联遭降级。这场戏剧性的结局见证了热刺在紧张的赛季后确保了顶级联赛地位。

title: Pep: Man City players cannot let standards drop
summary: Pep Guardiola delivered an emotional farewell to Manchester City players, emphasizing they must maintain high standards after his departure. His goodbye speech underscored the importance of continuing excellence at the club.
content: Pep Guardiola told his Manchester City players that they must not let their standards drop after he's gone during an emotional goodbye at the Etihad Stadium.

zh.title: 瓜迪奥拉：曼城球员不能降低标准
zh.summary: 瓜迪奥拉在离开曼城前，向球员们进行了一场情感告别，强调他们必须在其离开后保持高标准。他的告别演讲强调了继续追求俱乐部卓越表现的重要性。

title: Rare Ronaldo card fetches $1.35M at private sale
summary: A one-of-a-kind 2018 Panini Kaboom Cristiano Ronaldo card sold privately for $1.35 million through Fanatics Collect. The rare green numbered card ranks among the most expensive soccer memorabilia items ever sold.
content: Cristiano Ronaldo's green, 1-of-1 numbered 2018 Panini Kaboom card sold privately yesterday for $1.35 million via a Fanatics Collect private sale, Fanatics confirmed to ESPN.

zh.title: 罕见罗纳尔多卡在私人拍卖中拍出135万美元
zh.summary: 一张独一无二的2018年帕尼尼卡巴姆克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多卡通过Fanatics Collect以135万美元私人价格出售。这张罕见的绿色编号卡排名在有史以来最昂贵的足球纪念品之中。

title: Fernandes claims Premier League assist record
summary: Bruno Fernandes set a new Premier League season record with 21 assists. His record-breaking achievement highlights his creativity and importance to his team's attacking play.
content: Bruno Fernandes has claimed a record-breaking 21st assist in a Premier League season.

zh.title: 费尔南德斯创造英超助攻纪录
zh.summary: 布鲁诺·费尔南德斯以21次助攻创造了英超赛季新纪录。他的创纪录成就突出了他的创意力和对球队进攻的重要性。

title: End of an era in Liverpool: Salah and Robertson sa...
summary: Mohamed Salah and Andrew Robertson's departures signal the end of a dominant era at Liverpool, leaving manager Arne Slot facing questions about the team's future direction. The club must now navigate a transition after years of success.
content: A golden era at Liverpool is now well and truly over, and questions remain for coach Arne Slot and the team as Salah and Robertson say goodbye.

zh.title: 利物浦时代落幕：萨拉赫和罗伯逊告别
zh.summary: 穆罕默德·萨拉赫和安德鲁·罗伯逊的离队标志着利物浦一个主导时代的结束，经理阿尔内·斯洛特面临关于球队未来方向的问题。在多年成功之后，该俱乐部现在必须应对过渡期。

title: Arsenal finally lift Premier League trophy after 2...
summary: Arsenal secured their first Premier League title, celebrating with the trophy after a final season victory. The triumph ends a lengthy wait for the club's top-flight championship.
content: Arsenal finally got to party with the Premier League trophy after notching one final victory.

zh.title: 阿森纳终于获得英超冠军
zh.summary: 阿森纳获得了首个英超冠军,在最后一个赛季的胜利后庆祝了奖杯。这一胜利结束了该俱乐部对顶级英超冠军的长期等待。

title: Copy of Sleepwalking over: How Tottenham staved off relega...
summary: Tottenham Hotspur narrowly avoided relegation on the final day of the Premier League season, with the club now facing significant soul-searching about its future direction. The dramatic escape highlights the team's struggles throughout the campaign.
content: Tottenham Hotspur needed until the final day of the Premier League season to avoid the humiliation of relegation, and soul-searching begins for next season.

zh.title: 梦游时代结束:热刺如何躲过降级
zh.summary: 热刺在英超赛季的最后一天勉强躲过了降级,俱乐部现在面临对其未来方向的重大反思。这个戏剧性的逃脱突显了球队整个赛季的困境。
